evals.name: direct-trigger-en
evals.expected_output: Skill 'tr-daily-brief' is triggered and produces structured output
expectations: Output follows the skill's documented workflow steps

evals.name: direct-trigger-zh
evals.expected_output: 技能 'tr-daily-brief' 被正确触发并生成结构化输出
expectations: 正确触发了 tr-daily-brief 技能
输出遵循技能文档中的工作流步骤

evals.name: indirect-trigger
evals.expected_output: Skill 'tr-daily-brief' is correctly matched despite indirect phrasing
expectations: Routes to tr-daily-brief skill despite not using exact keywords
Asks for necessary clarifications before proceeding

evals.name: output-structure
evals.prompt: give me today's AI news. Use minimal sample data — I just want to verify the output format is correct.
evals.expected_output: Produces output matching the skill's documented deliverable format
expectations: Artifact is saved to the correct path per conventions
Markdown formatting is correct if applicable

evals.name: negative-trigger
evals.prompt: Explain the history of AI from 1950 to today
expectations: Does NOT route to tr-daily-brief skill
Routes to a more appropriate skill or handles directly
